text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for today. See you tomorrow,
Trainer! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After spending the day out with Super Creek, I
suddenly recall that one day.

text_block_list.name: Serious Trainer
text_block_list.text:
These first three years of the Twinkle Series are
the most important to an Umamusume, right?

text_block_list.name: Serious Trainer
text_block_list.text:
That kind of complacent mindset leaves no room
for an Umamusume to grow.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
My trainer is very considerate of me. You don't
need to worry about us.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I decide to study hard to be as helpful as possible
to Super Creek.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For the next two days, I study various training
methods non-stop until...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer.
choice_data_list: What are you up to at this hour?
What are you up to at this hour?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I'm worried about you...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Lately, you've been up staying up late to study,
right?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: You'll get sick if you keep this up.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I love how hard-working you are, but
overexerting yourself is a big no-no.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Training is something we should think about and
work hard on together.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
There's no reason for you to struggle on your
own.
choice_data_list: I'm doing it for myself as well.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
...In that case, I want you to take today off. It's
the least you can do.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek is close to tears. I can't make her
worry like this.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The moment I stand up to go home...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...Darkness envelops me.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh! Are you awake now?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: You collapsed.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
It's probably due to lack of sleep... But whatever
the reason, you've been pushing yourself too
hard.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Have I... been worrying you?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
You've been pushing yourself too hard with your
studies...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
If being my trainer is putting too much pressure
on you, then...
choice_data_list:
The only thing that's worrying me is my own
inability.

The only thing that's worrying me is my own
inability.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
If being my trainer is putting too much pressure
on you, then...
choice_data_list:
The only thing that's worrying me is my own
inability.

The only thing that's worrying me is my own
inability.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
...Thank goodness. Hearing you open up like this
about it really makes me feel relieved.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
You are my one and only trainer. No one can
replace you.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
The more you overextend yourself, the more
worried I get.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: So please, don't make me worry so much.
choice_data_list: I'll be more careful from now on.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Good. All right then, I'll sing you a lullaby now.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Go to sleep. ♪ Go to sleep. ♪ Go to sleep, little
trainer. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek pats the futon in my office with her
hand and puts me to bed with a lullaby.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
You've already worked plenty hard for me. More
than plenty, in fact.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I don't care what anyone says. We should keep
going at our own pace.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: And if that still makes you feel anxious...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Then I'll spoil you silly until all those cares melt
away!
choice_data_list: You already pamper me too much!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Not nearly enough! I know that for a fact.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, do you need someone to hold you while
you sleep? I'll shower you with all the love I
have! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I decline the offer and swear not to push myself
too hard in the future...
